mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attendance_submissions WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_submissions ( user_id, target_year_month, status, submitted_at, action_by, action_comment, action_at, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{targetYearMonth}, #{status}, #{submittedAt}, #{actionBy}, #{actionComment}, #{actionAt}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_submissions SET status = #{status}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, action_by = #{actionBy}, action_comment = #{actionComment}, action_at = #{actionAt}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId}
